TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Linhoko Yincuminco salongoc a wacay (ikilis: United Nations Declaration on the Rights of Indigenous Peoples, sakamoke' a tilid UNDRIP) nai Linhoko sa'opo i 2007 miheca 9 folad 13 romi'ad mahayda kinian pakayniay to salongoc no Yincuminco niketonan. Talacowa o ni a wacay caay ka citodong i sapalit i rikec no kasakitakit, manga'ay pido'edoan misalof to skidemak no Yincumin, sapipalasawad to sapiforaw, miepecay ato milawacay to salongoc no Yincuminco. Salaloma'an no wacay halo niya ato kapolongan salongoc no Yincuminco, ato sakipunka, kacingangan, sowal, katayalan, someletay, kiyiku a salongoc. Paini to iraay ko sakararid ato pahapinang to sakirocek no yincumin, punka ato lekakawa, misafaloco' to kacitodong no finacadan kacilongocan ato misafaloco'an sakacomahad. Paini o Yincuminco ira ko kacitodong mikihatiya to malacalayay demak, ato pa'orip to noniya a faco' ato sapikilim to niya a kicay, pafaloco'an no sakacomahad no syakay a salongoc. Paterepen ko misawacoay to Yincuminco. Patosokan no wacay o sakanga'ay no kasakitakit ato Yincuminco a malalilid sanga'ay misaomah, kasasiromaroma a punka, ato sakiniyaro' kasasiiked a 'icel. Amilika, Autaliya, Kanata ato Niwsilan sakiniaan a nihaydaan miliyangay. o Autaliya(2009), Kanata(2010), Niwsilan(2010) mihaydaayto tina wacay. Pasetek 表決 O mihaydaay kitakit:(itiya a kitakit ato fayfay ato mikowanay latek caay kalecad aniniay.) Miliyangay kitakit. Masawaday kitakit. 以下國家棄權: Awaayay kitakit. 缺席:
S.PHON: ɾinħo~uko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a waʦaj (ikiɾis: o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns ɬ~ɮəʦɾaratio~un o~un tħə ri*ħts o~uf inɬ~ɮi*əno~uo~u~us pəo~upɾəs, sakamo~ukəʡ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ o~u~unɬ~ɮrip) nai ɾinħo~uko~u saʡo~upo~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maħajɬ~ɮa kinian pakajniaj to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u nikəto~unan. taɾaʦo~uwa o~u ni a waʦaj ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i sapaɾit i rikəʦ no~u kasakitakit, maŋaʡaj piɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan misaɾo~uf to~u skiɬ~ɮəmak no~u jinʦo~u~umin, sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapifo~uraw, miəpəʦaj ato~u miɾawaʦaj to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u waʦaj ħaɾo~u nija ato~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, ato~u sakipo~u~unka, kaʦiŋaŋan, so~uwaɾ, katajaɾan, so~uməɾətaj, kijiko~u~u a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. paini to~u iraaj ko~u sakarariɬ~ɮ ato~u paħapinaŋ to~u sakiro~uʦək no~u jinʦo~u~umin, po~u~unka ato~u ɾəkakawa, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan kaʦiɾo~uŋo~uʦan ato~u misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan sakaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ. paini o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ira ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikiħatija to~u maɾaʦaɾajaj ɬ~ɮəmak, ato~u paʡo~urip to~u no~unija a faʦo~uʡ ato~u sapikiɾim to~u nija a kiʦaj, pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u sakaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. patərəpən ko~u misawaʦo~uaj to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. pato~uso~ukan no~u waʦaj o~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u kasakitakit ato~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a maɾaɾiɾiɬ~ɮ saŋaʡaj misao~umaħ, kasasiro~umaro~uma a po~u~unka, ato~u sakinijaro~uʡ kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a ʡiʦəɾ. amiɾika, ao~u~utaɾija, kanata ato~u niwsiɾan sakiniaan a niħajɬ~ɮaan miɾijaŋaj. o~u ao~u~utaɾija(****), kanata(****), niwsiɾan(****) miħajɬ~ɮaajto~u tina waʦaj. pasətək ** o~u miħajɬ~ɮaaj kitakit:(itija a kitakit ato~u fajfaj ato~u miko~uwanaj ɾatək ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ aniniaj.) miɾijaŋaj kitakit. masawaɬ~ɮaj kitakit. ******: awaajaj kitakit. **:
S.FORM: Linhoko Yincuminco salongoc a wacay (ikilis: United Nations Declaration on the Rights of Indigenous Peoples, sakamoke' a tilid UNDRIP) nai Linhoko sa'opo i 2007 miheca 9 folad 13 romi'ad mahayda kinian pakayniay to salongoc no Yincuminco niketonan. Talacowa o ni a wacay caay ka citodong i sapalit i rikec no kasakitakit, manga'ay pido'edoan misalof to skidemak no Yincumin, sapipalasawad to sapiforaw, miepecay ato milawacay to salongoc no Yincuminco. Salaloma'an no wacay halo niya ato kapolongan salongoc no Yincuminco, ato sakipunka, kacingangan, sowal, katayalan, someletay, kiyiku a salongoc. Paini to iraay ko sakararid ato pahapinang to sakirocek no yincumin, punka ato lekakawa, misafaloco' to kacitodong no finacadan kacilongocan ato misafaloco'an sakacomahad. Paini o Yincuminco ira ko kacitodong mikihatiya to malacalayay demak, ato pa'orip to noniya a faco' ato sapikilim to niya a kicay, pafaloco'an no sakacomahad no syakay a salongoc. Paterepen ko misawacoay to Yincuminco. Patosokan no wacay o sakanga'ay no kasakitakit ato Yincuminco a malalilid sanga'ay misaomah, kasasiromaroma a punka, ato sakiniyaro' kasasiiked a 'icel. Amilika, Autaliya, Kanata ato Niwsilan sakiniaan a nihaydaan miliyangay. o Autaliya(2009), Kanata(2010), Niwsilan(2010) mihaydaayto tina wacay. Pasetek 表決 O mihaydaay kitakit:(itiya a kitakit ato fayfay ato mikowanay latek caay kalecad aniniay.) Miliyangay kitakit. Masawaday kitakit. 以下國家棄權: Awaayay kitakit. 缺席:
S.PHON: ɾinħo~uko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a waʦaj (ikiɾis: o~u~unitəɬ~ɮ natio~uns ɬ~ɮəʦɾaratio~un o~un tħə ri*ħts o~uf inɬ~ɮi*əno~uo~u~us pəo~upɾəs, sakamo~ukəʡ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ o~u~unɬ~ɮrip) nai ɾinħo~uko~u saʡo~upo~u i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maħajɬ~ɮa kinian pakajniaj to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u nikəto~unan. taɾaʦo~uwa o~u ni a waʦaj ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i sapaɾit i rikəʦ no~u kasakitakit, maŋaʡaj piɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan misaɾo~uf to~u skiɬ~ɮəmak no~u jinʦo~u~umin, sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u sapifo~uraw, miəpəʦaj ato~u miɾawaʦaj to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u waʦaj ħaɾo~u nija ato~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, ato~u sakipo~u~unka, kaʦiŋaŋan, so~uwaɾ, katajaɾan, so~uməɾətaj, kijiko~u~u a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. paini to~u iraaj ko~u sakarariɬ~ɮ ato~u paħapinaŋ to~u sakiro~uʦək no~u jinʦo~u~umin, po~u~unka ato~u ɾəkakawa, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan kaʦiɾo~uŋo~uʦan ato~u misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan sakaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ. paini o~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ira ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikiħatija to~u maɾaʦaɾajaj ɬ~ɮəmak, ato~u paʡo~urip to~u no~unija a faʦo~uʡ ato~u sapikiɾim to~u nija a kiʦaj, pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u sakaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u sjakaj a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. patərəpən ko~u misawaʦo~uaj to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. pato~uso~ukan no~u waʦaj o~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u kasakitakit ato~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a maɾaɾiɾiɬ~ɮ saŋaʡaj misao~umaħ, kasasiro~umaro~uma a po~u~unka, ato~u sakinijaro~uʡ kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a ʡiʦəɾ. amiɾika, ao~u~utaɾija, kanata ato~u niwsiɾan sakiniaan a niħajɬ~ɮaan miɾijaŋaj. o~u ao~u~utaɾija(****), kanata(****), niwsiɾan(****) miħajɬ~ɮaajto~u tina waʦaj. pasətək ** o~u miħajɬ~ɮaaj kitakit:(itija a kitakit ato~u fajfaj ato~u miko~uwanaj ɾatək ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ aniniaj.) miɾijaŋaj kitakit. masawaɬ~ɮaj kitakit. ******: awaajaj kitakit. **:
